plugins.name: agency-builder-hub
plugins.description: Skill quality tooling — grade eval runs against evals.json and evaluate skills against the Agency Skill Design Framework before shipping.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub MCP server for repository management — issues, pull requests, code review, and repository search.

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab MCP server for repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis.

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Vercel MCP server for deployments, projects, environment variables, and hosting workflows.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Figma MCP server for design files, components, variables, and design-to-code workflows.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear MCP server for issue tracking — create issues, manage projects, and update statuses.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Playwright MCP server for browser automation — screenshots, form fills, and end-to-end testing.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Context7 MCP server for up-to-date library documentation and code examples from source repositories.

plugins.name: next-devtools
plugins.description: Next.js DevTools MCP server for App Router debugging, routing, and framework introspection.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Engineering practice — architecture, epic design, implementation, code review, merge requests, docs, debugging, and technical debt.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Product management practice — strategy, backlog, tasks, sprint planning, validation, specs, stakeholder updates, research, competitive analysis, metrics, and brainstorming.

plugins.name: brand
plugins.description: Brand practice — visual identity guide (brand-guide) and brand voice lifecycle (discover, write, review, refine, enforce).

plugins.name: frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Agentic frontend engineer — React/Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, Base UI. Builds and maintains UI and client state, reading the target repo's AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md before changing anything.

plugins.name: senior-frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Agentic senior frontend engineer — peer code reviewer for React/Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, and accessibility. Reviews diffs against design docs and acceptance criteria; produces blocking/non-blocking verdicts.

plugins.name: product-manager
plugins.description: Agentic product manager — strategy docs, roadmaps, backlogs, sprint planning, task decomposition, specs, stakeholder updates, research synthesis, and competitive briefs. Follows docs/product/ and docs/work/{epic}/ conventions.

plugins.name: principal-frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Agentic principal frontend engineer / tech lead — final technical gate on open PRs/MRs. Validates React/Next.js architecture, security, and acceptance-criteria coverage. Maps to delivery-review crew gate.

plugins.name: qa-engineer
plugins.description: Agentic QA engineer — validates changes after CI: deploy QA workspace, automated tests, exploratory pass, document defects. Maps to delivery-qa crew flow.
